title: Requests to a non-existing node via non-canonical URL are rejected
description:
**Patterns**

* `/<node-id>` -> Short URLs for F1 Book
* `/<short-node-id>` → MC 1.0 short URLs
* `/<node-type>/<node-id>` -> unofficial shortcut for MC 2.0
* `/<node-type>/<short_node-id>` → unofficial shortcut for MC 1.0
* `/<node-title>__<short_node-id>` → official MC 1.0 URLs
